title: Exams
content:
For each in-class exam, there are two practice exams, called A and B, intended to be of the same general level of difficulty as the actual exam.
EXAMS SOLUTIONS Practice exam 1A (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 1B (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 2A (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 2B (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 3A (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 3B (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 4A (PDF) (PDF) Practice exam 4B (PDF) (PDF)
